project.description: A Claude Code Marketplace repository providing 7 production bundles with development standards, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows for CUI Open Source projects. Contains skills, agents, and commands for Java, JavaScript, Python, OCI, documentation, requirements engineering, and plugin development.
project.description_reasoning: source: README.adoc introduction and module descriptions

default.responsibility: Root project module providing the pyprojectx build system wrapper (./pw) for Python-based testing, linting, and type checking across all marketplace bundles.

build.py.description: Pyprojectx build orchestrator with module filtering for compile, test, lint, and coverage

marketplace/adapters.description: Multi-assistant export adapters for OpenCode and future formats

defaults.description: Modern Python patterns with pyprojectx, ruff, mypy, pytest
Language-agnostic code quality principles (SRP, CQS, complexity, error handling)
Modern Python patterns with pyprojectx, ruff, mypy, pytest
Language-agnostic code quality principles (SRP, CQS, complexity, error handling)
Language-agnostic testing methodology (AAA, coverage, reliability, determinism)
Modern Python patterns with pyprojectx, ruff, mypy, pytest
Language-agnostic code quality principles (SRP, CQS, complexity, error handling)

documentation.responsibility: Project-level documentation including build structure, architecture decisions, and user guides in AsciiDoc format.

plan-marshall.responsibility: Core orchestration bundle providing plan lifecycle management (6-phase model), build system abstraction (Maven/Gradle/npm/Python), script execution, permission management, architecture analysis, and CI/CD integration workflows.
plan-marshall.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with skills, agents, commands

skills/manage-lifecycle.description: Plan lifecycle management with 6-phase model and status transitions

skills/manage-architecture.description: Architecture discovery, enrichment, and query API for project structure analysis

skills/extension-api.description: Extension API for domain bundle discovery and build system abstraction

skills/marshall-steward.description: Project configuration wizard and maintenance menu system

pm-dev-frontend.responsibility: JavaScript and frontend development standards covering ES modules, modern patterns, CSS, JSDoc, ESLint/Prettier configuration, and testing with Jest and Cypress.
pm-dev-frontend.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with standards and agents

pm-dev-frontend-cui.responsibility: CUI-specific JavaScript project standards covering Maven integration, Quarkus DevUI components, NiFi processors, and SonarQube JavaScript analysis.
pm-dev-frontend-cui.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle extending pm-dev-frontend for CUI

pm-dev-java.responsibility: Comprehensive Java development standards covering core patterns, null safety (JSpecify), Lombok, CDI/Quarkus, JUnit 5 testing, JavaDoc, and Maven build profiles. Agent-first architecture for autonomous implementation.
pm-dev-java.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with standards, agents, scripts

skills/java-core.description: Core Java patterns, modern features, and performance optimization

skills/junit-core.description: JUnit 5 testing with AAA pattern and coverage standards

skills/java-quarkus.description: Quarkus-specific CDI standards with native image support

pm-dev-java-cui.responsibility: CUI-specific Java development standards covering CuiLogger with LogRecord patterns, test data generators, value object contracts, HTTP client testing with MockWebServer.
pm-dev-java-cui.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle extending pm-dev-java for CUI

pm-dev-oci.responsibility: OCI container standards covering image building, Dockerfile best practices, multi-platform builds, distroless health probes, and runtime security hardening.

pm-dev-python.responsibility: Python domain extension providing pyprojectx build operations with execution and output parsing for marketplace script development.
pm-dev-python.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with Python build integration

pm-documents.responsibility: Documentation standards for AsciiDoc formatting, Architectural Decision Records (ADRs), interface specifications, and technical writing quality with tone analysis and review workflows.
pm-documents.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with documentation standards and scripts

skills/ref-asciidoc.description: AsciiDoc formatting, validation, and link verification

skills/manage-adr.description: Architectural Decision Record management and templates

pm-documents.skills_by_profile_reasoning: python: Python scripts in skills; documentation: AsciiDoc standards and validation

pm-plugin-development.responsibility: Complete toolchain for creating, diagnosing, fixing, and maintaining marketplace components (skills, agents, commands). Includes plugin-doctor quality analysis, marketplace inventory scanning, and component creation wizards.
pm-plugin-development.purpose_reasoning: marketplace bundle with plugin development tools

skills/plugin-doctor.description: Quality analysis and automated fixes for marketplace components

skills/plugin-create.description: Component creation wizards for skills, agents, and commands

pm-requirements.responsibility: Requirements engineering standards covering SMART principles, specification authoring, planning documentation, traceability between specifications and implementation, and project initialization.
